rationale: This is essentially a licensed-IP static ad for Dokkan Battle (Goku Ultra Instinct) — the entire hook depends on anime brand recognition we don't have, so it's not a replicable archetype for Archery Clash without IP infringement risk. Mechanically there's zero overlap: no aiming, dueling, or gear progression is communicated, just a charging energy blast. Audience skews male/action-oriented which mildly overlaps, but the anime-collector RPG demo converts poorly into PvP archery; do not pursue this archetype.
